items.description: To intentionally focus your attention on a sound or a speaker to understand what they are communicating
A total absence of sound or a choice to refrain from speaking
To formally sign up or enroll, usually for military service, or to secure the help and support of someone for a cause
A decorative material consisting of thin, shimmering strips of metal, plastic, or paper, traditionally draped over Christmas trees to create a glittering, icy effect
A geographical term for a narrow strip of water extending from a sea or lake into the land, or a passage between islands
To change or modify something in some way, such as its size, shape, or character, without changing it into something entirely new
A state of heightened watchfulness or a warning signal used to notify people of danger, an issue, or an important update
A time in the future or an event occurring after a present or previously mentioned time
Another name for the honey badger
A historical silver coin widely used in German states between the 15th and 19th centuries
To look at something steadily or intently
Measures, prices, or speeds of something
Drops of liquid from the eyes, or to rip something apart
Weeds resembling wheat plants
A type of flowering plant with star-shaped blooms
Extra or additional; available for use
A weapon with a pointed tip used for thrusting or throwing
To analyse the structure of language or data
A type of sweet, juicy fruit
To gather or harvest crops or rewards
